items.title: Guest Expert — 6 Episodes
items.description: In-depth discussions on child support payments, PSI rules, lump-sum payments, child maintenance trusts, and non-agency payments for the accounting and advisory community.

items.title: Leaders in Family and Child Support Law in Melbourne
items.description: Feature article recognising Simon Bacon as one of Australia's eminent practitioners in child support, with nearly 40 years of combined experience with his partner.

items.title: Child Support Editor — Peer-Reviewed Articles
items.description: Appointed Child Support Editor for the Family Law Review. Published peer-reviewed articles on substitution orders, amicus curiae, pre-emptive declaratory orders, overseas child support, and the autochthonous expedient.

items.title: Men Seek Proof of Paternity Before Paying Up
items.description: Simon Bacon featured as an expert commentator on paternity testing and child support obligations, advocating for extended timeframes for fathers to challenge assessments.

items.title: Depreciation and Child Support
items.description: Published article examining how business depreciation expenses are challenged under section 117(2)(c)(i) of the Child Support (Assessment) Act 1989. Vol. 79, No. 9, September 2005.
